question: How to use the New Document function?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the New Document icon
3. Choose the 'Document Type' you want (Blank Document, Business Letter, Project Report, Internal Memo, Personal Resume, Newsletter, Invoice)
4. Change the 'Document Title' to what you want (default: 'Untitled Document')
5. Click the 'Create Document' button

question: How to use the Open Document function?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Open Document icon
3. Click the 'Choose File' button to select a file
4. Select a file from your computer (.txt, .html, .htm, .md files) or enter the document content in the 'Paste document content...' field
5. Click the 'Open Document' button

question: How to use the Save Document function?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Save Document icon
3. The filename field will be pre-filled with the Document Title from 'New Document',you can change the filename if needed
4. Choose the 'Save Format' (HTML Document, Plain Text, Markdown)
5. Click 'Save Document'button to download the file with the chosen name

question: How to use the Print Document function?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Print Document icon
3. Choose Printer (Default Printer or Save as PDF)
4. Select Page Range (All Pages, Current Page, or Custom Range)
5. Click the 'Print' button

answer:
1. Click the 'File' section

3. Click the 'Refresh Page' button, the page will reload

2. Click the Copy icon
3. Click the Direct Copy icon that under the Copy icon, the submenu will appear
4. Select the text you want to copy
5. Click the 'Copy Plain Text' icon, the text without formatting will be copied to clipboard

answer:

2. Click the Copy icon
3. Click the Formatted Copy icon that under the Copy icon, the submenu will appear
3. Select the text you want to copy with cursor
4. Click the 'Copy Formatted Text' button, the text with formatting will be copied to clipboard

question: How to use the Paste function?
answer:
1. Click the 'Edit' section
2. Click the Paste Content icon
3. Position cursor where you want to paste
4. Click the 'Smart Paste(Ctrl+V)' button to paste the text without formatting from clipboard/ or Click the 'Paste Plain Text' button to paste the text without formatting from clipboard/ or Click the 'Paste Formatted' button to paste the text with formatting from clipboard. Then the text from clipboard will be inserted

question: How can I insert a 'Report' template, convert the first paragraph into a numbered list, cut the second paragraph, and then zoom out the view to 75%?

question: How can I create a new document, increase the indent of a paragraph, and then replace all instances of the word 'project' with 'assignment'?

1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the New Document icon
3. Choose 'Blank Document' as the Document Type
4. Change the 'Document Title' to 'Project Plan'
5. Click the 'Create Document' button
6. Click the 'Tools' section
7. Click the Bulleted List icon
8. Place your cursor in the document where you want to start the bulleted list
9. Type 'Project Overview' and then click the 'Add Bullet' button to convert it to a bulleted list item
10. Click the 'Insert' section
11. Click the Insert Link icon
12. Enter 'https://www.example.com' in the Link URL field
13. Enter 'More Details' in the link display text field
14. Move the cursor to the end of the 'Project Overview' bullet point
15. Click 'Insert Link' button to create the link

question: How can I create a new document using a template from the Template Library, insert a star symbol at a specific location, and then set the page orientation to landscape?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section.
2. Click the New Document icon.
3. Choose the 'Document Type' you want, such as 'Blank Document'.
4. Change the 'Document Title' to your desired title or leave it as 'Untitled Document'.
5. Click the 'Create Document' button.
6. Click the 'Insert' section.
7. Click the Template Library icon.
8. Select a template from the template library, such as 'Business Letter'.
9. Click the 'Insert' section again.
10. Click the Insert Symbol icon.
11. Move the cursor to the position where you want to insert the symbol.
12. Select the '★Star button' to insert a star symbol.
13. Click the 'View' section.
14. Click the Page Setup icon.
15. Configure the page orientation to 'Landscape'.
16. Click 'Apply Orientation' button to apply the settings.

question: How can I open the 'sustainability_report.txt' document, zoom in to 150%, and insert a star symbol (★) at the beginning of the Executive Summary section?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section.
2. Click the Open Document icon.
3. Click the 'Choose File' button to select a file.
4. Select the file named 'sustainability_report.txt' from your computer.
5. Click the 'Open Document' button.
6. Click the 'View' section.
7. Click the Zoom In View icon.
8. Select the 150% zoom level.
9. Click the 'Apply Zoom In' button to magnify the document.
10. Click the 'Insert' section.
11. Click the Insert Symbol icon.
12. Move the cursor to the beginning of the Executive Summary section.
13. Select the ★Star button to insert the star symbol at the desired position.

question: How can I insert a 'Report' template from the Template Library, add a page break after the first paragraph, and then highlight the first sentence of the second page in bright yellow?
answer:
1. Click the 'Insert' section.
2. Click the Template Library icon.
3. Click the 'Report' template from the template library; the template will be inserted.
4. Click the 'Help' section.
5. Click the Page Break icon.
6. Position the cursor at the end of the first paragraph where you want the page break.
7. Click the 'Insert Page Break' button; a page break will be inserted.
8. Click the 'Format' section.
9. Click the Highlight Display icon.
10. Choose 'Bright Yellow' from the color squares.
11. Select the first sentence of the second page with the cursor.
12. Click the 'Apply Highlight' button to apply the highlight color.

question: How can I create a new document, set it to landscape orientation, italicize the title, and then copy the formatted title?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the New Document icon
3. Choose the 'Blank Document' as the Document Type
4. Change the 'Document Title' to your desired title (e.g., 'My New Document')
5. Click the 'Create Document' button
6. Click the 'View' section
7. Click the Page Setup icon
8. Configure the page orientation to 'Landscape'
9. Click 'Apply Orientation' button to apply settings
10. Click the 'Format' section
11. Click the Italic Format icon
12. Select the title text you want to make italic
13. Click 'Apply Italic (Ctrl+I)' button, the title text will become italic
14. Click the 'Edit' section
15. Click the Copy icon
16. Click the Formatted Copy icon under the Copy icon
17. Select the italicized title text with the cursor
18. Click the 'Copy Formatted Text' button, the italicized title text will be copied to the clipboard

question: How can I insert a 'Report' template, zoom out the view to 75%, and then justify align the first paragraph of the inserted template?
answer:
1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Template Library icon
3. Click the 'Report' template from the template library, the template will be inserted
4. Click the 'View' section
5. Click the Zoom Out View icon
6. Select the '75%' zoom level
7. Click the 'Apply Zoom Out' button, the document will be reduced in size
8. Click the 'Format' section
9. Click the Justify Align icon
10. Select the first paragraph of the inserted template
11. Click the 'Apply Justify Align' button, the text will be justified (aligned to both margins)

question: How can I insert a 'Business Letter' template, view hidden characters to ensure formatting is correct, and then save the document as a Plain Text file?
answer:
1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Template Library icon
3. Click the 'Business Letter' template from the template library, and the template will be inserted
4. Click the 'View' section
5. Click the Show Hidden Characters icon
6. Click the 'Toggle Hidden Characters' button to make space characters, Tab characters, Paragraph marks, and line breaks visible
7. Review the document to ensure formatting is correct
8. Click the 'File' section
9. Click the Save Document icon
10. The filename field will be pre-filled with the Document Title, you can change the filename if needed
11. Choose 'Plain Text' as the 'Save Format'
12. Click 'Save Document' button to download the file with the chosen name

question: How can I insert a resume template, view hidden characters to ensure formatting is correct, and then share the document via a shareable link?

1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the New Document icon
3. Choose 'Blank Document' as the 'Document Type'
4. Change the 'Document Title' to 'Project Plan'
5. Click the 'Create Document' button
6. Click the 'View' section
7. Click the Toggle Ruler icon
8. Click the 'Toggle Ruler' button to display the ruler
9. Click the 'Format' section
10. Click the Underline Format icon
11. Select the text 'Project Plan' in the document
12. Click the 'Apply Underline (Ctrl+U)' button to underline the text

question: Can you guide me on how to open the document 'sustainability_report.txt' from my computer and then apply subscript formatting to the percentage '24%' in the Executive Summary section?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Open Document icon
3. Click the 'Choose File' button to select a file
4. Select the file named 'sustainability_report.txt' from your computer
5. Click the 'Open Document' button
6. Click the 'Format' section
7. Click the Subscript icon
8. Select the text '24%' in the Executive Summary section
9. Click the 'Apply Subscript' button to make the text appear smaller and lower

question: How can I insert a 'Business Letter' template, add a hyperlink to 'https://www.example.com' with the display text 'Visit Example', and then insert the 'logol.png' image at the end of the document?
answer:
1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Template Library icon
3. Click the 'Business Letter' template from the template library to insert it into your document
4. Click the 'Insert' section again
5. Click the Insert Link icon
6. Enter 'https://www.example.com' in the Link URL field
7. Enter 'Visit Example' in the link display text field
8. Move the cursor to the position where you want to insert the link
9. Click 'Insert Link' button to create the link
10. Click the 'Insert' section once more
11. Click the Insert Image icon
12. Click the 'Choose File' button
13. Select the 'logol.png' image file from your computer
14. Choose the image size (Small, Medium, Large) as desired
15. Move the cursor to the end of the document where you want to insert the image
16. Click 'Insert Image' button to add it to your document

question: How can I open the document 'sustainability_report.txt', set the page orientation to landscape, and then change the color of the title to blue?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Open Document icon
3. Click the 'Choose File' button to select a file
4. Select the file 'sustainability_report.txt' from your computer
5. Click the 'Open Document' button
6. Click the 'View' section
7. Click the Page Setup icon
8. Configure the page orientation to 'Landscape'
9. Click 'Apply Orientation' button to apply the settings
10. Click the 'Format' section
11. Click the Text Color icon
12. Choose the 'blue' color from the color square
13. Select the title '2025 Sustainability and Responsibility Report — Lumos Energy Corporation' with the cursor
14. Click the 'Apply Color' button to change the text color

question: How can I create a new blank document, insert a basic equation, add a high-priority comment to the equation, and then switch the interface to night mode?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section.
2. Click the New Document icon.
3. Choose 'Blank Document' as the document type.
4. Change the 'Document Title' to your desired title or leave it as 'Untitled Document'.
5. Click the 'Create Document' button.
6. Click the 'Insert' section.
7. Click the Insert Equation icon.
8. Choose 'Basic Equation' as the equation type.
9. Enter the equation content you want to add in the equation content field.
10. Move the cursor to the position where you want to insert the equation.
11. Click the 'Insert Equation' button to add the equation.
12. Click the 'Tools' section.
13. Click the New Comment icon.
14. Input the comment you want to add in the comment content field.
15. Input your name in the comment author field.
16. Select 'High Priority' from the comment priority field.
17. Select the equation text in the document with the cursor.
18. Click 'Add Comment to Selected Text' button to save the comment.
19. Click the 'View' section.
20. Click the Night Mode icon.
21. Click the 'Toggle Night Mode' button to switch the interface to dark theme.

question: How can I create a new document titled 'Scientific Notes', apply superscript to the text 'H2O', and then change its color to blue?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section.
2. Click the New Document icon.
3. Choose 'Blank Document' as the 'Document Type'.
4. Change the 'Document Title' to 'Scientific Notes'.
5. Click the 'Create Document' button.
6. Type 'H2O' into the document.
7. Click the 'Format' section.
8. Click the Superscript icon.
9. Select the '2' in 'H2O' with your cursor.
10. Click the 'Apply Superscript' button to make the '2' appear smaller and higher.
11. Click the 'Format' section again.
12. Click the Text Color icon.
13. Choose the 'blue' color from the color square.
14. Select the entire text 'H2O' with your cursor.
15. Click the 'Apply Color' button to change the text color to blue.

question: How can I insert a 'Business Letter' template, italicize the first paragraph, and then use the Format Painter to apply the same italic formatting to the second paragraph?
answer:
1. Click the 'Insert' section.
2. Click the Template Library icon.
3. Click the 'Business Letter' template from the template library, and the template will be inserted.
4. Click the 'Format' section.
5. Click the Italic Format icon.
6. Select the first paragraph of the inserted template with your cursor.
7. Click 'Apply Italic (Ctrl+I)' button, and the text will become italic.
8. Click the 'Edit' section.
9. Click the Format Painter icon.
10. Select the first paragraph with the italic formatting using the cursor.
11. Click the 'Copy Format' icon.
12. Select the second paragraph where you want to apply the italic formatting.
13. Click the 'Apply Format' button, and the italic formatting will be applied to the second paragraph.

question: How can I create a new document, insert a star symbol, and then apply subscript formatting to the text 'H2O' in the document?

question: How can I create a new document, highlight a specific text, check the character count, and then change the default font settings?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section.
2. Click the New Document icon.
3. Choose the 'Document Type' you want (e.g., Blank Document).
4. Change the 'Document Title' to what you want (default: 'Untitled Document').
5. Click the 'Create Document' button.
6. Click the 'Format' section.
7. Click the Highlight Display icon.
8. Choose the highlight color you want from the color squares (e.g., Bright Yellow).
9. Select the text you want to highlight.
10. Click the 'Apply Highlight' button to apply the highlight color.
11. Click the 'Tools' section.
12. Click the Character Count icon.
13. Click the 'Show Character Count' button to show the character count, the count will be displayed in the document.
14. Click the 'Help' section.
15. Click the Application Settings icon.
16. Choose the font you want to set (e.g., Arial).
17. Choose the font size you want to set (e.g., 14px).
18. Click 'Apply Default Font' button to apply changes.

question: How can I create a new document using a template from the library, convert some text into a numbered list, and then apply strikethrough to one of the list items?

question: How can I insert a 'Report' template, change the line spacing to double, increase the indent of the first paragraph, and then copy the first paragraph as plain text?

1. Click the 'Insert' section.
2. Click the Template Library icon.
3. Click the 'Report' template from the template library, the template will be inserted.
4. Click the 'Format' section.
5. Click the Line Spacing icon.
6. Select the first paragraph you want to change.
7. Click the spacing options button and select 'Double(2.0x)', the line spacing will be changed to 2.0x.
8. Click the 'Tools' section.
9. Click the Increase Indent icon.
10. Select the first paragraph you want to indent.
11. Click the 'Increase Indent' button, the paragraph will move to the right.
12. Click the 'Edit' section.
13. Click the Copy icon.
14. Click the Direct Copy icon under the Copy icon, the submenu will appear.
15. Select the first paragraph you want to copy.
16. Click the 'Copy Plain Text' icon, the text without formatting will be copied to the clipboard.

question: How can I open the 'sustainability_report.txt' document, convert the 'Executive Summary' section into a bulleted list, justify align the 'Conclusion' section, and then perform a spell check on the entire document?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Open Document icon
3. Click the 'Choose File' button to select a file
4. Select the file named 'sustainability_report.txt' from your computer
5. Click the 'Open Document' button
6. Click the 'Tools' section
7. Click the Bulleted List icon
8. Place your cursor before the text in the 'Executive Summary' section
9. Click the 'Add Bullet' button to convert the text into a bulleted list
10. Click the 'Format' section
11. Click the Justify Align icon
12. Select the 'Conclusion' section
13. Click the 'Apply Justify Align' button to justify align the text
14. Click the 'Tools' section
15. Click the Spell Check icon
16. Click the 'Start Check' button to scan for spelling errors
17. Choose the correct spelling from the suggestions or click the 'Ignore' button to ignore any word

question: How can I create a new document, apply strikethrough to a sentence, check for spelling errors, and then clear all formatting?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section.
2. Click the New Document icon.
3. Choose the 'Document Type' you want, such as 'Blank Document'.
4. Change the 'Document Title' to your desired title or leave it as 'Untitled Document'.
5. Click the 'Create Document' button to create the new document.
6. Type the sentence you want to apply strikethrough to.
7. Click the 'Format' section.
8. Click the Strikethrough Format icon.
9. Select the text you want to strikethrough.
10. Click the 'Apply Strikethrough' button to apply the strikethrough formatting.
11. Click the 'Tools' section.
12. Click the Spell Check icon.
13. Click the 'Start Check' button to scan for spelling errors.
14. Choose the correct spelling from the suggestions or click the 'Ignore' button to ignore the word.
15. Click the 'Format' section again.
16. Click the Clear Format icon.
17. Select the text with formatting you want to clear.
18. Click the 'Clear Format' button to remove all formatting.

question: How can I open the document 'sustainability_report.txt', insert a link to 'https://www.lumosenergy.com' with the display text 'Lumos Energy', and then undo the link insertion?
answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Open Document icon
3. Click the 'Choose File' button to select a file
4. Select the file 'sustainability_report.txt' from your computer
5. Click the 'Open Document' button
6. Click the 'Insert' section
7. Click the Insert Link icon
8. Enter 'https://www.lumosenergy.com' in the Link URL field
9. Enter 'Lumos Energy' in the link display text field
10. Move the cursor to the position in the document where you want to insert the link
11. Click 'Insert Link' button to create the link
12. Click the 'Edit' section
13. Click the Undo icon
14. Click the 'Undo(Ctrl+Z)' button to reverse the link insertion

question: How can I insert a Business Letter template, apply strikethrough to the first sentence, and then insert a page break after the strikethrough text?

question: Can you guide me on how to open the document 'sustainability_report.txt', insert a link to 'https://lumosenergy.com' with the display text 'Lumos Energy', add a high-priority comment 'Verify this link' to the inserted link, and then perform a spell check on the document?

question: How can I insert a 'Business Letter' template, zoom out the view to 75%, and then undo the zoom out operation?
answer:
1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Template Library icon
3. Click the 'Business Letter' template from the template library, and it will be inserted
4. Click the 'View' section
5. Click the Zoom Out View icon
6. Select the '75%' zoom level
7. Click the 'Apply Zoom Out' button to reduce the document size
8. Click the 'Edit' section
9. Click the Undo icon
10. Click the 'Undo(Ctrl+Z)' button to reverse the last action, which will undo the zoom out operation
